description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The front facade includes a covered entryway, a double garage, and a landscaped area with palm trees and decorative plants. Large windows are present on the front and sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house includes a spacious backyard area with what appears to be a pile of rocks or landscaping material. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color palette, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The structure is primarily constructed from concrete and glass, with metal and wood likely used for detailing and window frames.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a double garage, large windows, and landscaped front and rear areas. The design is minimalist with clean lines and a light exterior finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, double garage, landscaped garden, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal window openings and a solid wall, highlighting the house's length and flat roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large backyard area with a pile of rocks or landscaping material and additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mix of small windows and a clear view of the backyard and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on the front and smaller windows on the sides
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a flat overhang, double garage, landscaped approach, and minimal decorative elements
